message:
fix(tui): improve G (jump-to-bottom) navigation in history and board modes

Extend the G/Shift-G keybinding to handle board mode edge navigation and
history view cursor positioning more accurately, resetting relevant
cursors to prevent stale state after jumping to the last visible item.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
